label: Link comp
description: Links this hediff to another pawn with the same hediff.

Class.label: Properties class
Class.description: C# HediffCompProperties type for this list item.

drawConnection.label: Draw connection
drawConnection.description: If true, a visual line is drawn between linked pawns.

requireConnectedTo.label: Require connected to
requireConnectedTo.description: Required linked hediff on another pawn.

onlyActiveIfSeverity.label: Only active if severity
onlyActiveIfSeverity.description: Minimum severity on linked pawn to stay active.

onlyActiveIfBothHaveSameLinkType.label: Only active if both have same link type
onlyActiveIfBothHaveSameLinkType.description: Only active if both pawns have the same link type.
